requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Transport Safety — UN 38.3 & UK CDG Regulations
requirement_topic.zh: 危险品运输安全——UN 38.3与英国CDG法规
requirement_topic.zht: 危險品運輸安全——UN 38.3與英國CDG法規

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries (UN 3090 / UN 3091 — lithium metal; UN 3480 / UN 3481 — lithium-ion) are classified as Class 9 dangerous goods for transport purposes. For UK road and rail transport, the Carriage of Dangerous Goods and Use of Transportable Pressure Equipment Regulations 2009 (SI 2009/1348, the CDG Regs) implement ADR (road) and RID (rail) requirements. For air transport, IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) apply. For sea transport, IMDG Code applies. Critically, all lithium cells and batteries — whether transported standalone or contained in or packed with equipment — must have successfully passed the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) test series before transport. UN 38.3 tests include altitude simulation, thermal cycling, vibration, shock, external short circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, and forced discharge. A Summary of Test Results (SoTR) must accompany each shipment.
summary.zh: 锂电芯及电池（UN 3090 / UN 3091——金属锂；UN 3480 / UN 3481——锂离子）在运输方面被列为第9类危险品。对于英国公路及铁路运输，2009年《危险品运输及可携式压力设备使用法规》（SI 2009/1348，CDG法规）实施ADR（公路）及RID（铁路）要求。航空运输适用IATA危险品规则（DGR）；海运适用IMDG规则。关键在于，所有锂电芯及电池——无论单独运输、随设备内装或随设备包装——均须在运输前成功完成联合国《关于危险货物运输的建议书：试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3节（UN 38.3）的测试系列。UN 38.3测试包括高空模拟、热循环、振动、冲击、外部短路、碰撞/挤压、过充及强制放电。每批货物须附带测试结果摘要（SoTR）。
summary.zht: 鋰電芯及電池（UN 3090 / UN 3091——金屬鋰；UN 3480 / UN 3481——鋰離子）在運輸方面被列為第9類危險品。對於英國公路及鐵路運輸，2009年《危險品運輸及可攜式壓力設備使用法規》（SI 2009/1348，CDG法規）實施ADR（公路）及RID（鐵路）要求。航空運輸適用IATA危險品規則（DGR）；海運適用IMDG規則。關鍵在於，所有鋰電芯及電池——無論單獨運輸、隨設備內裝或隨設備包裝——均須在運輸前成功完成聯合國《關於危險貨物運輸的建議書：試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3節（UN 38.3）的測試系列。UN 38.3測試包括高空模擬、熱循環、振動、衝擊、外部短路、碰撞/擠壓、過充及強制放電。每批貨物須附帶測試結果摘要（SoTR）。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (7th revised edition, 2019 + Amendment 1, 2021) — mandatory test series for lithium cells and batteries before transport
Carriage of Dangerous Goods and Use of Transportable Pressure Equipment Regulations 2009 (SI 2009/1348) — UK CDG Regs implementing ADR/RID for road/rail
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — current edition — for air transport
IMDG Code — current amendment — for sea transport

summary.en: Chinese exporters are generally required to obtain UN 38.3 test reports for lithium batteries before export — this requirement is internationally aligned (it is mandated by IATA, IMDG, and ADR/RID regardless of country of origin). Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratories issue UN 38.3 test reports that are typically accepted internationally as UN 38.3 is a test standard, not a country-specific certification scheme. However, the shipper must verify: (1) the test report covers the specific cell/pack model being shipped; (2) the SoTR is current (must reflect any design change); (3) the GB/T 28541-2012 (China national standard for lithium battery transport testing) — where used — must still meet the UN 38.3 test content requirements; (4) Chinese export documentation uses the correct UN numbers and packing instructions (PI 965–970 for IATA).
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常须在出口前为锂电池取得UN 38.3测试报告——这是国际上统一要求的（IATA、IMDG及ADR/RID均强制要求，与原产国无关）。中国CNAS认可实验室出具的UN 38.3测试报告通常在国际上被接受，因为UN 38.3是测试标准而非特定国家认证体系。但托运人须核实：（1）测试报告涵盖所运输的具体电芯/电池型号；（2）测试结果摘要（SoTR）为最新版本（须反映任何设计变更）；（3）使用的GB/T 28541-2012（中国锂电池运输测试国家标准）须满足UN 38.3测试内容要求；（4）中国出口文件须使用正确UN编号及包装说明（IATA包装说明PI 965–970）。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常須在出口前為鋰電池取得UN 38.3測試報告——這是國際上統一要求的（IATA、IMDG及ADR/RID均強制要求，與原產國無關）。中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的UN 38.3測試報告通常在國際上被接受，因為UN 38.3是測試標準而非特定國家認證體系。但托運人須核實：（1）測試報告涵蓋所運輸的具體電芯/電池型號；（2）測試結果摘要（SoTR）為最新版本（須反映任何設計變更）；（3）使用的GB/T 28541-2012（中國鋰電池運輸測試國家標準）須滿足UN 38.3測試內容要求；（4）中國出口文件須使用正確UN編號及包裝說明（IATA包裝說明PI 965–970）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28541-2012 — Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries (national standard; must align with UN 38.3 content)
UN 38.3 test report from CNAS-accredited laboratory (internationally aligned; typically accepted)

gap.en: The primary transport gap is not a UK-specific gap but a shipment-specific documentation gap: (1) The UN 38.3 test report must cover the exact cell/pack model — generic or family reports covering different chemistries or form factors are insufficient. (2) The SoTR must be provided to each person in the transport chain on request (IATA Section 2 requirement). (3) For air freight to the UK, IATA DGR Packing Instructions 965–970 apply — many Chinese shippers misclassify state of charge (cells must be ≤30% SoC for PI 965/968 Section II). (4) For UK domestic road/rail distribution, CDG Regs 2009 (ADR) requirements apply including placarding, consignment notes, driver training (ADR certificate), and vehicle requirements for quantities above threshold. (5) Post-Brexit, UK has retained ADR/RID via the CDG Regs — no separate UK-specific transport test is required beyond UN 38.3.
gap.zh: 主要运输差距并非英国特定差距，而是具体货物的文件差距：（1）UN 38.3测试报告须涵盖具体电芯/电池型号——涵盖不同化学体系或形态的通用或系列报告不足；（2）须应运输链各方要求提供测试结果摘要（SoTR）（IATA第2节要求）；（3）航空货运至英国适用IATA DGR包装说明PI 965–970——许多中国托运人错误分类荷电状态（PI 965/968 II类运输电芯须≤30% SoC）；（4）在英国公路/铁路国内分销，须遵守CDG法规2009（ADR）要求，包括标牌、运输单据、驾驶员培训（ADR证书）及超限量车辆要求；（5）脱欧后，英国通过CDG法规保留ADR/RID——除UN 38.3外，无需额外英国特定运输测试。
gap.zht: 主要運輸差距並非英國特定差距，而是具體貨物的文件差距：（1）UN 38.3測試報告須涵蓋具體電芯/電池型號——涵蓋不同化學體系或形態的通用或系列報告不足；（2）須應運輸鏈各方要求提供測試結果摘要（SoTR）（IATA第2節要求）；（3）航空貨運至英國適用IATA DGR包裝說明PI 965–970——許多中國托運人錯誤分類荷電狀態（PI 965/968 II類運輸電芯須≤30% SoC）；（4）在英國公路/鐵路國內分銷，須遵守CDG法規2009（ADR）要求，包括標牌、運輸單據、駕駛員培訓（ADR證書）及超限量車輛要求；（5）脫歐後，英國通過CDG法規保留ADR/RID——除UN 38.3外，無需額外英國特定運輸測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 test report required for all lithium cell/battery shipments regardless of destination; CDG Regs 2009 (ADR/RID) apply for UK road/rail transport
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — UN 38.3 testing required under Chinese export and international transport rules; GB/T 28541-2012 for domestic transport classification

source.publisher: legislation.gov.uk — Carriage of Dangerous Goods and Use of Transportable Pressure Equipment Regulations 2009

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A current UN 38.3 test report (covering the specific cell/pack model) and a Summary of Test Results are mandatory for all lithium battery shipments to the UK. UK domestic road/rail distribution must comply with CDG Regs 2009 (ADR/RID). Air and sea transport to the UK are governed by IATA DGR and IMDG respectively. Chinese CNAS lab-issued UN 38.3 reports are generally internationally accepted, but shippers must verify model-specific coverage, state-of-charge compliance, and correct packing instruction classification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 当前有效的UN 38.3测试报告（涵盖具体电芯/电池型号）及测试结果摘要，对所有运往英国的锂电池货物均为强制要求。英国国内公路/铁路分销须符合CDG法规2009（ADR/RID）。往英国的航空及海运分别受IATA DGR及IMDG规则约束。中国CNAS实验室出具的UN 38.3报告通常在国际上被接受，但托运人须核实型号专项涵盖范围、荷电状态合规性及正确包装说明分类。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 當前有效的UN 38.3測試報告（涵蓋具體電芯/電池型號）及測試結果摘要，對所有運往英國的鋰電池貨物均為強制要求。英國國內公路/鐵路分銷須符合CDG法規2009（ADR/RID）。往英國的航空及海運分別受IATA DGR及IMDG規則約束。中國CNAS實驗室出具的UN 38.3報告通常在國際上被接受，但托運人須核實型號專項涵蓋範圍、荷電狀態合規性及正確包裝說明分類。
